name: io.github.ahmedEid1/lumen
title: Lumen
description: Self-hostable agentic-AI LMS: catalog, RAG tutor, FSRS reviews, AI authoring, ingest.

install.notes: Lumen is self-hosted: bring up your own backend, mint a token with `make mcp-token`, then register the server. No public artifact (PyPI / OCI) is shipped yet.
install.claude_code: LUMEN_MCP_AUTH_TOKEN=<client_secret> claude mcp add lumen -- python -m app.mcp --transport stdio

stdio.description: Mint with `make mcp-token` on the Lumen instance; paste the printed client_secret into the env block.

tools.name: list_courses
tools.description: List Lumen courses in the public catalog. Optional `filter` does free-text search over title + overview.

tools.name: get_course
tools.description: Fetch one course by slug. Returns the full syllabus tree (modules + lessons) plus the course overview.

tools.name: search_lesson_content
tools.description: Semantic search across a course's lesson chunks. Returns top-K passages with lesson titles and pgvector cosine-distance scores (lower = better).

tools.name: ask_tutor
tools.description: Ask the Lumen course tutor a question. Returns a cited answer or refusal if the course content doesn't cover the topic. Requires enrollment.

tools.name: list_my_due_reviews
tools.description: Spaced-repetition queue for the calling user: cards whose FSRS-6 due-at has passed. Oldest-due first.

tools.name: grade_review_card
tools.description: Submit one FSRS-6 rating against a review card. `rating` is 1=again, 2=hard, 3=good, 4=easy.

tools.name: create_course_draft
tools.description: Generate a course outline from a brief and persist it as a draft course owned by the calling instructor.

tools.name: ingest_url_to_draft
tools.description: Import a YouTube / Notion / Google Docs URL into a draft course. Creates a fresh course when `course_id` is omitted, otherwise appends.

tools.name: list_my_progress
tools.description: Per-enrolled-course completion + mastery rollup for the calling user. Newest enrollment first.
